array.string: cd /Users/knutkirkhorn/dev/dotfiles && set -a && source .env && set +a && bun run scripts/init-clickup-week.ts; exit_code=$?; if [ $exit_code -ne 0 ]; then osascript -e 'display alert "ClickUp weekly init failed" message "Check /tmp/clickup-init-week.err.log" as critical buttons {"OK"} default button "OK"'; afplay /System/Library/Sounds/Basso.aiff; fi; exit $exit_code
